title: Xtra Cheesy Jamaican Asparagus Pasta
description: A pescatarian-friendly Jamaican dish featuring asparagus, with a peppery and cheesy flavor, and an al-dente finish, perfect for meal prep.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the pasta according to the package instructions until al-dente.
While the pasta is cooking, heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the diced onion and minced garlic to the skillet and saute until the onion is translucent.
Add the scotch bonnet peppers to the skillet and saute for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the shrimp to the skillet and saute until they are pink and fully cooked.
Add the jerk seasoning to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the asparagus to the skillet and saute until they are tender.
Drain the cooked pasta and add it to the skillet, stirring to combine with the shrimp and asparagus mixture.
Stir in the shredded cheddar and parmesan cheese until melted and well combined.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
